case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PAULETTE SHAW et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, PAULETTE PITTEARD, CHRISLETTE PITTEARD, TRAVELL DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
